name: RISEcredit
description_short: RISE offers online personal installment loans from $500 to $5,000 with next-business-day funding, flexible payment scheduling, and a 5-day risk-free guarantee.
description_long:
RISE is an online lender headquartered at 4150 International Plaza, Suite 300, Fort Worth, TX 76109, operating under the RISE brand (©2025 RISE). The company provides personal installment loans exclusively through its website, available only in states where permitted by law. In some states, loans are underwritten and originated by a bank partner rather than RISE directly.

RISE offers personal loans ranging from $500 to $5,000. Applicants apply entirely online, and approved borrowers who complete the process before 6 p.m. ET can typically receive funds in their checking account the next business day. Borrowers must have a valid checking account and email address, and approval amounts are subject to state-specific minimum income requirements. Full APR, fee, and payment term disclosures are provided in the loan agreement and on the Rates & Terms page.

Several features differentiate RISE from basic online lenders. The company offers a 5-Day Risk-Free Guarantee: borrowers can rescind their loan by calling (866) 580-1226 before 5 p.m. ET on the fifth business day from origination, repaying only the principal with no fees or interest charged. There are no prepayment penalties — paying off early is explicitly encouraged and can reduce total loan cost. RISE also includes Credit Score Plus, providing free credit score access and monitoring alerts to all borrowers. The initial rate check does not affect the applicant's FICO score, though a hard inquiry is placed when a loan is approved and accepted.

RISE is a viable option for borrowers who need a fast, small-to-mid-size installment loan and cannot qualify through traditional banks. The risk-free window and no-prepayment-penalty policy are genuine consumer protections. However, loan amounts top out at $5,000, availability is restricted by state, and borrowers should review their specific APR and fees carefully before accepting — as lenders in this segment commonly carry rates well above prime. The state-based bank-partner model also means terms and availability vary significantly by location.
address: 4150 International Plaza Ste 300, Fort Worth, TX 76109

company_info.headquarters: 4150 International Plaza Ste 300, Fort Worth, TX 76109

pros: 5-Day Risk-Free Guarantee — rescind the loan within 5 business days and pay only the principal, no interest or fees
No prepayment penalties — pay off early and save on total interest cost
Next-business-day funding when application is approved before 6 p.m. ET
Initial rate check does not affect FICO score
Free credit score monitoring included via Credit Score Plus
Flexible payment scheduling — borrowers choose their repayment schedule (state restrictions apply)
Fully online application process — no branch visit required
cons: Maximum loan amount is $5,000, limiting usefulness for larger financial needs
Available only in states where permitted — not a nationwide lender
Hard inquiry placed on credit report upon loan approval and acceptance, which may impact credit score
Approval amounts and available terms are subject to state-specific minimum income requirements
In some states loans are originated by a bank partner, so actual terms and lender vary by location
best_for: Borrowers who need $500–$5,000 quickly and want funds by the next business day
Consumers who want to test a loan offer risk-free before fully committing
People looking for a structured installment loan rather than a short-term payday loan
Borrowers who want free credit score monitoring bundled with their loan
diagnosis: RISE is best suited for borrowers who need a small-to-mid installment loan fast, value the ability to back out within 5 days, and want transparent scheduling flexibility. The primary caveat is that this lender targets non-prime borrowers, meaning APRs can be substantially higher than bank or credit union alternatives — borrowers should compare the full Rates & Terms before accepting any offer.
services: Soft credit check for initial rate inquiry (no FICO impact)
Credit Score Plus — free credit score access
Loans by state (state-specific terms and availability)
Online loan management and account access
